description: Maximum gradients (desirable and absolute) by terrain class for paved sections. Rural roads use DR1-DR7 standards; urban roads use DU1-DU6 standards.
note: Note 1 from Table 6.5: On expressways a maximum gradient should not exceed 4%. Table 6.6 provides maximum lengths of gradient. Minimum gradient for drainage is 0.5% (Section 6.5.4).

rural_DR1_to_DR7.description: Maximum gradients for rural road design standards DR1 to DR7

urban_DU1_to_DU6.description: Maximum gradients for urban road design standards DU1 to DU6

data.expressway_note: On expressways (DR1), maximum gradient shall not exceed 4%

maximum_lengths.description: Maximum lengths of gradient (Table 6.6, source: SANRAL and SATCC)
